[[File:Voidwaker detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''Voidwaker''' is a melee weapon that requires level 75 [[Attack]] to wield. It is acquired by having [[Madam Sikaro]] in the [[Ferox Enclave Dungeon]] reassemble the [[Voidwaker blade]], [[Voidwaker hilt|hilt]], and [[Voidwaker gem|gem]] for a fee of {{NoCoins|500000|c}}, which are obtained as rare drops from [[Vet'ion]], [[Callisto]], and [[Venenatis]] respectively (or their lesser counterparts).

Attempting to assemble it on your own by using the pieces on each other displays the message {{mes|You don't think you have the skills to reassemble this weapon yourself.}}.

==Special attack==
[[File:Disrupt.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the Voidwaker's special attack, ''Disrupt''.]]
The Voidwaker has a [[special attack]], ''Disrupt'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy. The special attack deals [[successful hit|guaranteed]] Magic damage between 50-150% of the wielder's maximum melee hit. The special attack will provide 2 Magic experience per damage dealt.

The special attack is particularly useful due to its guaranteed medium to high damage. In [[Player killing|PvP]], it can be used for a consistent finishing blow and it pairs well with other high-damage special attack weapons such as the [[Armadyl godsword|Armadyl]] or [[ancient godsword]], [[dragon claws]], or [[granite maul]] due to its special attack cost. In [[Monster killing|PvM]], it excels against opponents with high Defence and low-medium Hitpoints, such as [[Kalphite Queen]], [[God Wars Dungeon]] bosses, and [[Phosani's Nightmare]], where dragon claws or other weapons would deal less damage on average and Defence reduction is less effective.

As it deals Magic damage, it is less effective against opponents with a Magic damage resistance, such as players using [[Protect from Magic]] or [[Great Olm]]'s melee claw. Conversely, it deals full damage against the [[Corporeal Beast]]. In the [[Theatre of Blood]], in the fight against [[Nylocas Vasilias]], this special attack only deals damage against the magic (blue) form.

==History==
Aside from the weapon's name, it is very similar to ''RuneScape 3''{{'}}s {{RSL|Korasi's sword}} as it was in 2010, which was given as an untradeable reward for completing the grandmaster quest {{RSL|The Void Stares Back}}. As the quest required 80 [[Magic]], 71 [[Firemaking]], 70 [[Construction]], 70 [[Crafting]], 70 [[Smithing]], 55 [[Summoning]], 10 [[Defence]], and 78 [[Attack]] and [[Strength]], these effectively acted as the requirements to wield the sword.

The Voidwaker's special attack also bears similarity to that of Korasi's sword. Despite sharing the name ''Disrupt'' with the original, the Voidwaker's special attack excludes the chain-hitting effect of Korasi's sword, which could damage up to two additional, adjacent targets for 50% and 25% of the first hit's damage in multi-combat areas. However, the Voidwaker's ''Disrupt'' only requires 50% special attack energy to use, as opposed to the original's 60%.

In comparison, the Voidwaker is a tradeable item, dropped in three tradeable parts (the blade, hilt, and crystal) from [[Callisto]], [[Venenatis]], and [[Vet'ion]], and only requires level 75 [[Attack]] to wield. The Voidwaker also has slightly higher stats compared to the original iteration of Korasi's sword:
{{Infotable Bonuses header}}
{{Infotable Bonuses row|name=rsw:Korasi's sword|hideicon=yes|altname=Korasi's sword|astab=+60|aslash=+70|acrush=-2|amagic=0|arange=0|dstab=0|dslash=+1|dcrush=0|dmagic=0|drange=0|str=+70|prayer=0|rstr=0|mdmg=0}}
{{Infotable Bonuses row|name=Voidwaker|hideicon=yes|astab=+70|aslash=+80|acrush=-2|amagic=+5|arange=0|dstab=0|dslash=+1|dcrush=0|dmagic=+2|drange=0|str=+80|prayer=0|rstr=0|mdmg=0}}
{{Infotable Bonuses footer}}

During [[Project Rebalance]], Jagex proposed to alter the Voidwaker's special due to player concerns about its special attack, which was a guaranteed hit and would often hit very high, even through prayers. Initial proposals suggested to change the special attack to give an increased accuracy multiplier based on the target's Slash or Magic defence, whichever was lower. Both suggestions were not well-received, as these changes were primarily meant for [[player killing]] scenarios and would have a much more negative impact in player versus monster scenarios, as the monsters where the voidwaker was primarily used for had high slash and magic defence. On [[24 April]] [[2024]], the proposals were shelved and the voidwaker was left as is for the time being.

==Trivia==
* Despite the poll blog and newspost stating the Voidwaker requires level 75 [[Attack]], 75 [[Strength]], and 60 [[Magic]] to wield, the weapon only requires level 75 Attack to wield. It is not known whether this is an oversight or not.
* The special attack's sound effect is actually [[Superior Demonbane]]'s cast and an attack from [[Tombs of Amascut]] Wardens' boss fight sound effects playing at the same time.
* The voidwaker shares similarities in its special attack and animation with ''RuneScape 3's'' [[rsw:Korasi's sword|Korasi's sword]].
